title: Bug Clear Ultra Fruit and Veg Plant Protection, Ready To Use, 800 ml
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Effective bug control Controls blackfly, greenfly, whitefly, mealy bugs, spider mites and other mites. Same day spray and eat Ideal for use on fruits and vegetables (as well as ornamental plants). For use in organic systems Uses active ingredients derived from nature and is suitable for use in organic systems. Next page 1 Effective Bug Control 2 Same Day Spray & Eat 3 For Organic Systems Controls aphids, mealy bugs, red spider mites and other mites BugClear Fruit & Veg Ultra is a ready to use spray that controls aphids, mealy bugs, scale insects, red spider mites and other mites. It is ideal for use on fruit and vegetables (fruit and veg can be picked 24 hours after spraying, wash thoroughly before use), and also for use on ornamentals. Effects are visible within 1 day. Based on rapeseed oil, the product is fully certified for use in organic gardening. The bottle is made from 100% recycled material. Why should I use BugClear Fruit & Veg Ultra? BugClear Fruit & Veg kills a wide range of common insects including aphids. Treated fruit and veg can be picked 24 hours after spraying (wash thoroughly before use). Cab also be used on ornamental plants. Effects are visible within 1 day. Where can I use BugClear Fruit & Veg Ultra? Ideal for ornamental plants, fruit and vegetables. Do not treat sensitive species of floral plants with delicate foliage. Do not spray directly onto blooms. Any run-off onto desirable surfaces should be washed away as staining can occur. When should I use BugClear Fruit & Veg Ultra? Spray at the first signs of insects or symptoms until plants are clear of pests. For optimal control and persistence of effect, repeat applications are required at 7-10 day intervals. The best time to spray is early morning or early evening. How do I use BugClear Fruit & Veg Ultra? Choose a calm day, avoid bright sunlight, drought and frost. Shake well before use. Spray plants thoroughly to wet upper and lower surfaces of leaves. Avoid contact with non-target plants. Compare our range of plant pest and disease control products BugClear Ultra Spray Add To Basket BugClear Fruit&Veg Conc. Add To Basket BugClear Ultra 2 Conc.
